tasks.subject: Task 1: Add CompareLayoutOrientationKey command constant and the listLayout setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register the workspaceState key and the extension setting the rest of the feature depends on.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/config/commands.ts:156-158
- Modify: package.json:1238-1246

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] GitCommand.CompareLayoutOrientationKey exists and equals 'vscodeGitClient.compareLayoutOrientation'.
- [ ] package.json declares vscodeGitClient.compare.listLayout as a string enum (vertical/horizontal), default vertical.
- [ ] npm run compile succeeds.

**Verify:** npm run compile -> exits 0 with no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/config/commands.ts", "package.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run compile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GitCommand.CompareLayoutOrientationKey exists", "package.json has vscodeGitClient.compare.listLayout setting", "npm run compile succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add CompareLayoutOrientation get/set to StateStore
tasks.description:
**Goal:** StateStore can read the persisted layout orientation (falling back to the compare.listLayout setting when unset) and persist a new choice.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/state/stateStore.ts:26-30 and :618-626
- Test: src/test/stateStoreCompareLayout.test.ts (new)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CompareLayoutOrientation type declared.
- [ ] getCompareLayoutOrientation() returns workspaceState value when present, else falls back to getConfigValue('compare.listLayout', 'vertical').
- [ ] setCompareLayoutOrientation(orientation) persists to workspaceState.
- [ ] New test file passes.

**Verify:** npm test -> all tests pass, including 3 new cases in stateStoreCompareLayout.test.ts.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/state/stateStore.ts", "src/test/stateStoreCompareLayout.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CompareLayoutOrientation type declared", "getCompareLayoutOrientation falls back to setting", "setCompareLayoutOrientation persists", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add CompareLayoutOrientation support to CompareView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CompareView accepts a layoutStore, threads the orientation into the rendered template data, and handles the new setCompareLayout message from the webview.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/views/compareView.ts (types, messages/union, constructor, render/rerender, handleMessage, renderCompareHtml, type guards)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CompareLayoutOrientation, CompareLayoutOrientationStore, SetCompareLayoutMessage, isSetCompareLayoutMessage declared/exported.
- [ ] CompareView constructor takes a 5th parameter layoutStore: CompareLayoutOrientationStore.
- [ ] renderCompareHtml template data includes orientation and isHorizontalLayout.
- [ ] handleMessage persists setCompareLayout messages via layoutStore.setCompareLayoutOrientation and rerenders.

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit -p . -> only expected error is the CompareView constructor call in editorOrchestrator.ts (fixed in Task 4).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/views/compareView.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit -p .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CompareLayoutOrientationStore interface added", "constructor takes layoutStore", "renderCompareHtml includes orientation/isHorizontalLayout", "handleMessage handles setCompareLayout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire layoutStore into EditorOrchestrator.ensureCompareView()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve the compile error from Task 3 by supplying the new constructor argument backed by StateStore.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/editor/editorOrchestrator.ts:331-359

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ensureCompareView() passes a layoutStore object literal delegating to this.state.getCompareLayoutOrientation/setCompareLayoutOrientation.
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit -p . reports zero errors.

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit -p . -> exits 0, no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/editor/editorOrchestrator.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit -p .", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ensureCompareView passes layoutStore", "tsc reports zero errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add the Vertical/Horizontal toggle and CSS/JS to compareView.hbs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render a second .mode-toggle button group (List mode only) and make the .grid layout respond to isHorizontalLayout.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/views/templates/compareView.hbs (CSS, HTML, grid class, JS)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .grid.horizontal { flex-direction: row; } CSS rule added.
- [ ] grid div applies horizontal class when isHorizontalLayout is true.
- [ ] Second .mode-toggle group (layout-toggle-vertical / layout-toggle-horizontal) renders only when isListMode, correct active/aria-selected state.
- [ ] Clicking a layout button posts { type: 'setCompareLayout', orientation } only when different from current orientation.

**Verify:** npm run compile -> exits 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/views/templates/compareView.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "npm run compile", "acceptanceCriteria": [".grid.horizontal CSS added", "toggle only visible in List mode", "JS posts setCompareLayout message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Manual smoke test, docs updates, and final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the feature works end-to-end in the Extension Development Host, then update README.md and CHANGELOG.md per project convention.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md (feature bullets, settings table)
- Modify: CHANGELOG.md (Unreleased -> Added)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Manually verified in Extension Development Host: toggle appears next to List/Graph only in List mode, switching persists across panel close/reopen, setting changes initial orientation for a fresh workspace.
- [ ] README.md documents the new toggle and setting.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has a new Added bullet.
- [ ] npm test passes.
- [ ] GitNexus detect_changes() run and reviewed before considering feature complete.

**Verify:** npm test -> all tests pass. Manual verification steps in plan.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["manual smoke test passed", "README updated", "CHANGELOG updated", "npm test passes", "detect_changes reviewed"]}
```
